content: Structured AI Agent Workflows can be dynamically re-routed and expanded by an embedded 2025-style ICM curiosity mechanism, turning rigid step-by-step task execution into self-growing problem-solving systems that proactively seek out unplanned, high-information tasks to augment their original workflow. This creates a hybrid system that retains the reliability of predefined task sequences while gaining the ability to autonomously discover capability gaps that no human designer explicitly anticipated.
